summary: UBS  analyst David Vogt   maintains Jabil (NYSE:JBL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $244 to $254.

headline: Strong Demand Outlook Boosts Tech Names Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), Jabil (JBL) and CrowdStrike (CRWD)
summary: Wall Street is sharpening its outlook on three technology names tied to the AI infrastructure build-out, with fresh analyst actions this week reflecting growing conviction in demand durability. Bank of America raised its price target on Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) to $32, Morgan Stanley lifted its target on the same stock while also upgrading CrowdStrike ... Strong Demand Outlook Boosts Tech Names Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), Jabil (JBL) and CrowdStrike (CRWD)
